title: EntityType
description: Defines an entity type including its display name, available properties, and supported relationship types.

type.description: The entity type identifier, e.g., SERVICE.

displayName.description: The human-readable display name of the entity type.

description.description: A description of what this entity type represents.

properties.description: The list of properties available for this entity type.

fromRelationships.description: The relationship types where entities of this type are the source.

toRelationships.description: The relationship types where entities of this type are the target.
